user.title: Set up Vaillant eBusd MQTT
user.description: Enter the entity prefix and the MQTT base topic used by ebusd.

abort.already_configured: This ebusd instance is already configured.

set_heating_time_program.name: Set heating time program
set_heating_time_program.description: Sets the weekly heating schedule for one day (ebusd Z1Timer).

slots.name: Time windows
slots.description: Up to 3 entries: [{from: HH:MM, to: HH:MM}]

set_hot_water_time_program.name: Set hot water time program
set_hot_water_time_program.description: Sets the weekly hot water schedule for one day (ebusd HwcTimer).

slots.name: Time windows
slots.description: Up to 3 entries: [{from: HH:MM, to: HH:MM}]

trigger_legionella_protection.name: Trigger legionella protection
trigger_legionella_protection.description: Raises the hot water setpoint to the maximum once for a legionella protection cycle.
